ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "ship_country" TEXT /* Country where the order is being shipped */,
  "ship_city" TEXT /* City where the order is being shipped */,
  "ship_address" TEXT /* Address where the order is being shipped */,
  "company_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company agent handling the order */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company placing the order */,
  "total_payment" TEXT /* Total payment for the order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_company_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_agent_id") REFERENCES company_agents ("company_agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_company_name FOREIGN KEY ("company_name") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_agents" (
  "company_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the company agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the company agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the company agent */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the agent operates in */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the agent joined the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Primary contact person of the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_companies" (
  "shipping_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the shipping company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the shipping company */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the shipping company */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the shipping company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order the shipment belongs to */,
  "shipping_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping company handling the shipment */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date of the shipment */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_shipping_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_company_id") REFERENCES shipping_companies ("shipping_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer, agent) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the order */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
